station_cards.title: Outdoor Career Challenge Stations
instructions: Work in pairs or groups of 3.
Complete as many stations as you can.

cards.title: Guess the career
cards.prompt: I work with patients. I need strong communication skills. I may work in a hospital or clinic.

cards.title: Spot the strength
cards.prompt: This job often needs patience, close attention, and steady hands.
cards.task: Name one career that fits those strengths.

cards.title: Match the setting
cards.prompt: This person may work outside, measure land, and help plan what gets built.

cards.title: Follow the clues
cards.prompt: This person explains ideas clearly and helps others learn new skills.
